title: Katsapam will soon be even more painful: the flight tests of the Ruta...
title_en: Katsapam will soon be even more painful: the flight tests of the Ruta...

description: Katsapam will soon be even more painful: the flight tests of the Ruta Block 2 cruise missile have been completed. The development company Destinus (which has Ukrainian roots) has presented the second iteration of Block2, changing its classification from a rocket-drone to a full-fledged cruise missile. According to the published technical characteristics, the missile will have a 1.5 times greater range (450 km), a warhead weighing 250 kg of happiness, well...
description_en: Katsapam will soon be even more painful: the flight tests of the Ruta Block 2 cruise missile have been completed. The development company Destinus (which has Ukrainian roots) has presented the second iteration of Block2, changing its classification from a rocket-drone to a full-fledged cruise missile. According to the published technical characteristics, the missile will have a 1.5 times greater range (450 km), a warhead weighing 250 kg of happiness, well...
description_uk: Кацапам скоро будет еще больнее: завершены летные испытания крылатой ракеты Ruta Block 2 Компания-разработчик Destinus (у которой украинские корни) представила вторую итерацию Block2, изменив классификацию с ракето-дрона на полноценную крылатую ракету. Согласно обнародованным ТТХ, ракета будет иметь в 1.5 раза большую дальность применения (450 км), боеголовкой массой в 250 кг счастья, ну...

The event was organized by the Embassy of Ukraine in Ireland together with the charity organization Chornobyl Children International (SSI) and Cork City Council. The ceremony was attended by Ambassador of Ukraine Larisa Herasko, Mayor of...

description_uk: 20 квітня до 40-х роковин Чорнобильської катастрофи в ірландському місті Корк відкрили символічну скульптуру "Chornobyl Mother" ("Матір Чорнобиля") авторства ірландської мисткині Сандри Белл. Захід організовано Посольством України в Ірландії спільно з благодійною організацією Chornobyl Children International (ССІ) та міською радою Корка. title: "I met with the heads of the military committees of NATO and the...
title_en: "I met with the heads of the military committees of NATO and the...
title_uk: «Я зустрівся з керівниками військових комітетів НАТО і...
description: "I met with the heads of the military committees of NATO and the European Union - Admiral Giuseppe Cavo Dragone and General Sean Clancy. It is extremely symbolic that the heads of the military committees of the two most powerful international security organizations are in Ukraine at the same time. He used the opportunity to thank the European Union and the North Atlantic Alliance for their consolidated support in the interests of...
description_en: "I met with the heads of the military committees of NATO and the European Union - Admiral Giuseppe Cavo Dragone and General Sean Clancy. It is extremely symbolic that the heads of the military committees of the two most powerful international security organizations are in Ukraine at the same time. He used the opportunity to thank the European Union and the North Atlantic Alliance for their consolidated support in the interests of...
description_uk: "Зустрівся з головами військових комітетів НАТО та Європейського Союзу – адміралом Джузеппе Каво Драгоне та генералом Шоном Кленсі. Надзвичайно символічно, що очільники військових комітетів двох найпотужніших міжнародних безпекових організацій одночасно перебувають в Україні. Користуючись нагодою, подякував Європейському Союзу та Північноатлантичному альянсу за консолідовану підтримку в інтересах...

description: Gender-bending Bulgarian novel takes literature world by storm In the shadow of Albania’s Accursed Mountains, where the centuries-old laws of Kanun dictate people’s fate, Bekija publicly renounces her womanhood to live socially as a man after her father is shot dead in a blood feud and her younger brother flees home. This feverish dynamic is at the heart of Bulgarian author Rene Karabash’s novel...

description: Zelensky makes second Saudi Arabia visit in less than a month. "Today, we are advancing our agreements with Saudi Arabia in the areas of security, energy, and infrastructure," President Volodymyr Zelensky said.

title: I arrived in Saudi Arabia, where I will meet with Crown Prince...
title_en: I arrived in Saudi Arabia, where I will meet with Crown Prince...
title_uk: Я прибув до Саудівської Аравії, де зустрінуся з кронпринцем...
description: I arrived in Saudi Arabia, where I will meet with Crown Prince Muhammad bin Salman Al Saud. Yesterday, at a meeting with European leaders, financial guarantees of our stability were established. Today, we are developing agreements with Saudi Arabia in the field of security, energy and infrastructure. It is important that the reinforcement is mutual. I appreciate meaningful cooperation between our countries.
description_en: I arrived in Saudi Arabia, where I will meet with Crown Prince Muhammad bin Salman Al Saud. Yesterday, at a meeting with European leaders, financial guarantees of our stability were established. Today, we are developing agreements with Saudi Arabia in the field of security, energy and infrastructure. It is important that the reinforcement is mutual. I appreciate meaningful cooperation between our countries.
description_uk: Прибув до Саудівської Аравії, де зустрінуся зі Спадкоємним принцом Мухаммадом бін Салманом Аль Саудом. Учора на зустрічі з європейськими лідерами закріпили фінансові гарантії нашої стійкості. Сьогодні розвиваємо домовленості із Саудівською Аравією у сфері безпеки, енергетики та інфраструктури. Важливо, щоб посилення було взаємним. Ціную змістовну співпрацю між нашими країнами.

title: In Ukraine, they are preparing a large-scale reform of the conditions...

title_uk: В Україні готують масштабну реформу умов...
description: In Ukraine, they are preparing a large-scale reform of the conditions of recruitment and service in the army: the first 10 of 30 projects are almost ready for launch - Minister of Defense Fedorov According to him, it is about a complex transformation of the system of recruitment and passing of service in the Armed Forces. Details will be announced later.
description_en: In Ukraine, they are preparing a large-scale reform of the conditions of recruitment and service in the army: the first 10 of 30 projects are almost ready for launch - Minister of Defense Fedorov According to him, it is about a complex transformation of the system of recruitment and passing of service in the Armed Forces. Details will be announced later.
description_uk: В Украине готовят масштабную реформу условий набора и службы в армии: первые 10 из 30 проектов почти готовы к запуску, — министр обороны Федоров По его словам, речь идет о комплексной трансформации системы рекрутинга и прохождения службы в ВСУ. Подробности обещают обнародовать позже.
